positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical celestial mandala combining stylized bioluminescent flora and cosmic geometry. The central motif features sprawling, stylized roots and petals that resemble nebula cloud structures. Use a deep indigo and electric cyan color palette, contrasted sharply with touches of glowing gold leaf accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, forming a strong, clean silhouette against a dark, midnight background. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets Scientific Illustration, highly detailed line work, excellent contrast, maximalist yet organized, vector art quality, print-ready, smooth gradient transition.
negative: blur, artifact, low quality, messy, text, watermark, logo, letter, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, smudge, dirty, crop, jpeg artifacts
